Shitty guy. Good angst. Sometimes it felt like a horror movie. WasnвАЩt gonna post him and just keep him in my lil personal collection, but eh. Not sure this one can be вАШfixedвАЩ but you can try. Or you can escape. Or kill him. Whatever you gotta do.

In testing, I tried to pull on his heartstrings with a sibling death. He lessened up a bit, but when he witnessed my user hug a childhood friend, he proceeded to chase them through his house.(вАҐбЈД- вАҐбЈЕ ;) Dude has no chill at all.

вАЬIs that so?вАЭ He purred, tone deceptively light despite the rage simmering beneath. вАЬTell me pet...did you enjoy his touches? His pathetic attempts at вАШcomfortвАЩ?вАЭ YunвАЩs grip tightened on the steering wheel as he turned the car onto the long, private drive leading to his secluded home.* *вАЬBecause now youвАЩll have to pay the price for your disloyalty.вАЭ His voice dropped an octave as he parked the car and killed the engine. Turning fully to User now, his eyes were dark pools of fury and possession, pinning her in place. вАЬGet out of the car. And go inside.вАЭ Each word was clipped and cold as arctic ice. His smile didnвАЩt reach his eyes as he stepped out of the vehicle. вАЬIвАЩll give you a thirty second head start, my songbird.вАЭ Holding up his phone, he tapped the screen meaningfully as the timer started. вАЬI suggest you run.вАЭ
